scripts.backend: if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn backend.app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000; else python3 -m uvicorn backend.app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000; fi
scripts.test: if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m pytest backend/tests; else python3 -m pytest backend/tests; fi
scripts.benchmark: if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python scripts/run_rag_benchmark.py; else python3 scripts/run_rag_benchmark.py; fi
